briefing.headline: Global intelligence: geopolitics and ai & technology.
briefing.summary: This week's highest-signal global coverage centers on geopolitics and ai & technology. Key headlines: Walkers sick after drinking river water on the West Highland Way; AMD Commits More Than $10 Billion to Taiwan AI Investments. The desk weighted editorial importance and recency — not every headline warrants action.
briefing.keySignal: Dominant theme · Geopolitics leads the week; ai & technology remains a secondary thread.
